suggestions.title: Apply Key Vault references after Key Vault RBAC assignment
suggestions.recommendation: Split deployment order so Function App identity and RBAC are established before applying KV-referenced TRAPI app settings.

suggestions.title: Avoid split ownership of TRAPI app settings
suggestions.recommendation: Keep TRAPI app settings managed in one place to prevent drift.

suggestions.title: Treat TRAPI endpoint/deployment as secure only if policy requires
suggestions.recommendation: Use @secure and secure pipeline inputs when these values are considered secrets by policy.
